about/community.title: Join the Coco *community.*
about/community.lede: Find the Discord, GitHub, and socials where CocoIndex hangs out, and the fastest ways to get help or pitch an idea.

advanced_topics/custom_target_connector.title: Build a Custom *target connector.*
advanced_topics/custom_target_connector.lede: Wire a new external system into CocoIndex's target state model by implementing TargetHandler, tracking records, actions, and a TargetActionSink.

advanced_topics/exception_handlers.title: Error Handling and *recovery.*
advanced_topics/exception_handlers.lede: How failure isolation works across mount and use_mount, how interrupted updates recover automatically, and how to register exception handlers.

advanced_topics/internal_storage.title: CocoIndex's LMDB internal *storage.*
advanced_topics/internal_storage.lede: Set the db_path that tracks target states and memoization, and tune lmdb_map_size or lmdb_max_dbs for larger deployments.

advanced_topics/live_component.title: Author your own *live component.*
advanced_topics/live_component.lede: Implement the LiveComponent protocol with process and process_live to stream incremental updates through a LiveComponentOperator.

advanced_topics/memoization_keys.title: Memoization Keys and *states.*
advanced_topics/memoization_keys.lede: Customize how CocoIndex fingerprints arguments, deps, and context values with __coco_memo_key__, register_memo_key_function, and memo state validation.

advanced_topics/multiple_environments.title: Isolated CocoIndex *environments.*
advanced_topics/multiple_environments.lede: Create named Environments with their own db_path so libraries, tenants, and tests stay isolated from the default environment.

cli.title: The cocoindex *CLI.*
cli.lede: Invoke the cocoindex command, specify an APP_TARGET, load a .env file, and use global options like --app-dir and --env-file.

cli_commands.title: CLI subcommands *reference.*
cli_commands.lede: All cocoindex subcommands — drop, init, ls, show, update, server — with the options each one accepts.

faq.title: Frequently Asked *Questions.*
faq.lede: Answers on how change detection propagates through @coco.fn, how crashes recover, and whether target state writes are transactional.

common_resources/data_types.title: Common Resources and *data types.*
common_resources/data_types.lede: Shared abstractions every connector speaks — FileLike, FilePath, FilePathMatcher, Chunk — plus how they key stable memoization.

common_resources/id_generation.title: Stable IDs across *runs.*
common_resources/id_generation.lede: Use generate_id, generate_uuid, IdGenerator, and UuidGenerator to produce IDs that stay identical for the same inputs across incremental updates.

common_resources/vector_schema.title: Vector schemas in *annotations.*
common_resources/vector_schema.lede: Describe vector columns with VectorSchema and VectorSchemaProvider so connectors can pick the right column type from Annotated hints.

connectors/amazon_s3.title: Read objects from *Amazon S3.*
connectors/amazon_s3.lede: List and fetch S3 objects with list_objects, get_object, and read — bring your own aiobotocore client for AWS or MinIO.

connectors/doris.title: Write rows to Apache *Doris.*
connectors/doris.lede: Stream-load rows into Doris tables with vector and inverted indexes, using DorisConnectionConfig and a ContextKey-backed connection.

connectors/google_drive.title: Read files from Google *Drive.*
connectors/google_drive.lede: Iterate Drive folders with GoogleDriveSource using a service account, filter by MIME type, and drop files into mount_each.

connectors/kafka.title: Consume and produce with *Kafka.*
connectors/kafka.lede: Use topic_as_map as a LiveMapFeed source, produce messages to target states, and keep a ContextKey name stable to preserve tracking.

connectors/lancedb.title: Write vectors to *LanceDB.*
connectors/lancedb.lede: Declare LanceDB tables and rows as target states, with CocoIndex handling upserts and deletions via a ContextKey-managed connection.

connectors/localfs.title: The local filesystem *connector.*
connectors/localfs.lede: Walk directories, read files, and write file target states — with ContextKey-anchored base dirs so memoization survives a project move.

connectors/postgres.title: Read and write *Postgres.*
connectors/postgres.lede: Use PgTableSource for rows and declare table target states that CocoIndex syncs, with pgvector set up automatically when you use vectors.

connectors/qdrant.title: Write points to *Qdrant.*
connectors/qdrant.lede: Declare Qdrant collections and points as target states — named vectors, multi-vector configs, and gRPC or HTTP clients all supported.

connectors/sqlite.title: Write rows to *SQLite.*
connectors/sqlite.lede: Declare SQLite tables as target states with optional sqlite-vec vector support, via a managed connection bound to a ContextKey.

connectors/surrealdb.title: Write records to *SurrealDB.*
connectors/surrealdb.lede: Declare normal tables, relation edges, and vector indexes as target states, sharing a single transactional sink via a ConnectionFactory.

contributing/guide.title: Contributing to *CocoIndex.*
contributing/guide.lede: Pick up a good-first-issue, run prek checks, open a PR, and ship your change with the core team's review within one business day.

contributing/setup_dev_environment.title: Set up a dev *environment.*
contributing/setup_dev_environment.lede: Install Rust and uv, run maturin develop, enable prek hooks, and get a working local build of the CocoIndex Rust and Python stack.

getting_started/installation.title: Install *CocoIndex.*
getting_started/installation.lede: Install the v1 preview on Python 3.11 to 3.13 via pip, uv, or Poetry — including the pre-release flag each tool needs.

getting_started/overview.title: What is *CocoIndex?*
getting_started/overview.lede: A declarative, state-driven framework for incremental AI data pipelines: you describe target states, the Rust engine syncs what changed.

getting_started/quickstart.title: Write your first *flow.*
getting_started/quickstart.lede: Build a PDF-to-Markdown pipeline end-to-end — process_file with @coco.fn, a localfs DirTarget, and app.update_blocking to sync it all.

ops/entity_resolution.title: Dedupe entities with *resolve_entities.*
ops/entity_resolution.lede: Cluster near-duplicate names using FAISS similarity plus a pluggable LlmPairResolver, with optional pinning for established canonicals.

ops/litellm.title: Embed text with *LiteLLM.*
ops/litellm.lede: Wrap any of LiteLLM's 100+ providers behind LiteLLMEmbedder — async embed, VectorSchemaProvider, and Annotated column typing.

ops/sentence_transformers.title: Embed locally with Sentence *Transformers.*
ops/sentence_transformers.lede: SentenceTransformerEmbedder runs local models with cached weights and thread-safe GPU access, feeding dimensions straight into vector columns.

ops/text.title: Text splitting and language *detection.*
ops/text.lede: detect_code_language, SeparatorSplitter, and RecursiveSplitter — the built-in text ops for chunking and syntax-aware code splitting.

programming_guide/app.title: The App *runtime.*
programming_guide/app.lede: Create a coco.App, call update or update_blocking, monitor progress through UpdateHandle, and wire setup into an @coco.lifespan.

programming_guide/context.title: Sharing resources via *context.*
programming_guide/context.lede: Define ContextKey values, provide them in lifespan, and read them with use_context — the key name is the stable identity across runs.

programming_guide/core_concepts.title: Core *concepts.*
programming_guide/core_concepts.lede: The mental model behind CocoIndex — state-driven declaration, target states, processing components, and incremental sync under code and data changes.

programming_guide/function.title: The @coco.fn *decorator.*
programming_guide/function.lede: Opt a function into change detection and memoization with @coco.fn — tune deps, version, logic_tracking, batching, and runners per call site.

programming_guide/live_mode.title: Keep an app running in *live mode.*
programming_guide/live_mode.lede: Pass live=True so catch-up is followed by continuous reaction, with LiveMapView and LiveMapFeed sources streaming changes into mount_each.

programming_guide/processing_component.title: Processing *components.*
programming_guide/processing_component.lede: Components own target states at a component path — mount, use_mount, mount_each, and component_subpath decide ownership, sync, and cleanup.

programming_guide/sdk_overview.title: Tour of the CocoIndex *SDK.*
programming_guide/sdk_overview.lede: Where connectors, resources, and ops live in the package — plus StableKey, async-first orchestration, and the _blocking sync variants.

programming_guide/serialization.title: Serialization and type *annotations.*
programming_guide/serialization.lede: Return-type annotations let CocoIndex rebuild cached memo values; register oddball types with @coco.serialize_by_pickle for seamless roundtrips.

programming_guide/target_state.title: Declare your target *states.*
programming_guide/target_state.lede: Target states are what you want to exist in external systems — declare files, rows, or embeddings and CocoIndex converges targets to match.
